title: Manufacturing Engineer (Oil & Gas Equipment / 5 Days / West)
description:
• Monday – Friday: 8am – 5pm

• Company located at Tuas

• Well Established Oil & Gas Manufacturing Company

• Variable Bonus + Excellent Welfare & Benefits

Job Scope

  • Understand the full requirements of all manufacturing and improvement project.
  • Follow up on the kick start, execution, monitoring and work closely with related personnel to resolve issues until the completion of the project.
  • Perform technical review on sales order and work closely with the sales department or customer to clarify all technical specifications and job requirements on the sales order.
  • Generate PCR and manufacturing process plan.
  • Generate engineering drawings and perform drafting.
  • Support Asst. Engineering Manager on the job costing.
  • Continuously explore for new manufacturing method or new external providers to support the production.
  • Work closely with the Production team to resolve any production issue.
  • Support the procurement department to deal with external providers on all technical issues.
  • Understand and be aware of the impact of each activity to the company, its environment and minimize any detrimental results.
  • Ensure company and QHSE policies and procedures are adhered to at all times.
  • Participate/ attend all functions, activities and meeting organized by the company.
  • Perform other assignment and duties as and when required.


Requirement

  • Diploma / Degree in Mechanical / Manufacturing Engineering or equivalent
  • 1 - 3 years of relevant experience in metal machining or oil & gas industry

Candidates are encouraged to apply this position viaApply Now button with the following information in the resume:

  • Work experiences and job responsibilities
  • Current and Expected salary
  • Reason for leaving
  • Date of availability
  • Education background

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

KHOO SOT MEI (R21102604)

EA Recruitment Pte Ltd

EA License No: 21C0492
